one_time_description: Impairment loss on Wapta Mnodai Developments Ltd. (Ironhead Golf Course) due to continued closure
economic_notes: Paul First Nation has 11 enterprises accounted for by modified equity method including energy, land holdings, industrial closure services, and development corporations. Wapta Mnodai Developments Ltd. (Ironhead Golf Course) fully consolidated but suffered impairment and continued closure. Nation is economically dependent on ISC funding.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to obtain sufficient evidence on investments in related First Nation entities for prior year (March 31, 2021). 11 entities accounted for by modified equity method; 1 (Wapta Mnodai Developments Ltd./Ironhead Golf Course) fully consolidated. Large deferred revenue balance of $27.8M primarily from ISC funding received but not yet recognized. CMHC replacement reserve fund was underfunded by $639,701. Trust funds include Ottawa Trust, Settlement Trust, and Community Trust totaling $7.6M. No schedule of remuneration for chief/council/staff was included in the financial statements. ISC funding calculated as sum of ISC ($16,546,330) + ISC Health ($3,209,142) = $19,755,472. Total government transfers includes ISC + ISC Health + CMHC + FNDF + ISETS = $21,823,309. Restricted cash includes externally restricted $751,708 and internally restricted $1,210,685.
